headline: PPL Corporation signs Ratepayer Protection Pledge and highlights existing customer protections in Pennsylvania and Kentucky
summary: PPL Corporation today announced it has signed the White House's Ratepayer Protection Pledge, reaffirming the company's long-standing commitment to affordability, reliability and responsible growth.
